topic: Behavioral scientists found that people who prefer solitude .

framework.structure: ['The reason you'] + [Universal Relatable Behaviour] + ['is not'] + [Assumed Reason] + ['it is'] + [Dark Psychological Mechanism]
framework.trigger: Self-revelation — reframes a familiar experience with a disturbing explanation the viewer cannot unsee
framework.example: The reason you can't stop scrolling is not boredom. It is a dopamine loop engineered by behavioural scientists.

script.hook: The reason you can't stop scrolling is not boredom. It is a dopamine loop engineered by behavioural scientists.
script.body: This psychological mechanism gives an unfair advantage in every conversation.
script.cta: Follow — there's more they're not saying.

full_script_text: The reason you can't stop scrolling is not boredom. It is a dopamine loop engineered by behavioural scientists. This psychological mechanism gives an unfair advantage in every conversation. Follow — there's more they're not saying.

caption_text: The reason you can't stop scrolling is not boredom. It is a dopamine loop engine
